_doc: The List (PLST) — bespoke novelty recipe. The List isn't a real sealed product (its cards are inserted one-at-a-time into Set/Play Boosters); this is a 'open a slice of The List' pack: 14 cards drawn across the whole PLST pool + 1 foil. authoritative:true offers only this one pack. Like MB2, pull values reflect real Scryfall prices for the reprints in the pool and can be high — that's the source data, not a recipe bug.

draft.tagline: 15 cards pulled from across The List — reprints spanning the whole game · ends on a foil
